name: Jitsi Meetings v3 — Zoom-style calls + multistream
description: Free HD video meetings powered by Jitsi: screen share, chat, breakout rooms, MP4 recording, large-meeting mode, and GO LIVE to YouTube, Facebook, Twitch, TikTok, Instagram and more — right from Chrome.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; frame-src https:; child-src https:; media-src 'self' blob:
